connectors.title: Connectors
connectors.subtitle: Browse and enable integrations for your workflows
connectors.slack_desc: Send messages, create channels, and manage notifications via Slack
connectors.jira_desc: Create issues, update tickets, and manage projects in Jira
connectors.ldap_desc: Manage users, groups, and access in Active Directory or LDAP

templates.title: Templates
templates.subtitle: Ready-to-use workflow templates for common IT operations
templates.onboarding_desc: Automate the full employee onboarding process: create accounts, provision access, notify teams, and set up workstation.
templates.offboarding_desc: Securely decommission departing employee: revoke access, disable accounts, transfer data, and notify stakeholders.
templates.patch_desc: Scheduled patch deployment: scan for updates, test in staging, deploy to production, and verify compliance.
templates.backup_desc: Automated backup health checks: verify backup jobs completed, test restore capability, and alert on failures.
templates.access_desc: Periodic access audit: pull user permissions, flag excessive access, route approvals to managers, and revoke unauthorized access.

landing.title: IT Ops Automation
landing.description: Automate your IT operations with visual workflows. Onboarding, provisioning, maintenance, and more — all in one place.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Overview of your IT automation workflows
dashboard.noExecutions: No executions yet. Create and run a workflow to see results here.

workflows.title: Workflows

workflows.noWorkflowsDescription: Create your first automation workflow to get started.
